name: Chicken with 40 Cloves of Garlic
recipeIngredient: 3 frying chickens, cut into serving sizes
6 stalks celery (pieces about the same length as the carrots)
2 large onions (halved lengthwise and divided into narrow pieces)
40 cloves garlic (peeled, use 5 or 6 heads if preferred)
recipeInstructions:
1. If purchasing whole chickens, cut them into serving-size pieces.
2. Rub the chicken pieces with olive oil.
3. Peel the carrots and cut into chunks about 2-3 inches long.
4. Cut the celery into pieces about the same length as the carrots.
5. Halve the onions lengthwise and divide each half into narrow pieces (like matchsticks).
6. Peel the garlic cloves and discard the skins; keep the cloves whole.
7. Arrange the chicken pieces in a casserole dish with a tight lid.
8. Distribute the carrots, celery, garlic, and parsley over the chicken.
9. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
10. Pour the dry white wine over everything.
11. Cover the casserole with foil, ensuring it extends beyond the sides of the dish when the lid is placed.
12. Place the lid on the casserole and bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours.
YIELD: 6-8 servings
